response.overview: A 40-minute horror film in which two police officers on a late-night patrol to a certain abandoned building uncover a past connection and have a terrifying experience.The main character is a rookie female police officer named Sudo. The other is a veteran male police officer named Komiyama. The video is shot from Sudo's point of view, so for the most part, you see a cheerful, veteran police officer prominently on screen, but to put it simply, it was terrifying.
response.title: ふり返りの旋律
